reviews.title: Still the best slingshot game
reviews.text: Classic physics, short levels, and no learning curve. Works great on old phones.

reviews.title: Perfect for quick sessions
reviews.text: Easy to jump in for a few minutes and finish a level or two. The controls still feel precise.

reviews.title: Great remake of the original formula
reviews.text: The bird powers are fun again and the game runs smoothly even on API 21 devices.

reviews.title: Good, but I miss more challenge
reviews.text: Nice art and sounds, but the early levels are too easy. Later stages are much better.

reviews.title: My kids keep asking for one more level
reviews.text: Simple to understand, colorful, and easy to hand to a child without explaining much.

reviews.title: Good performance on x86 emulator
reviews.text: Installed it to test game compatibility and it launched without any weird glitches or crashes.

reviews.title: Soundtrack is still iconic
reviews.text: You hear one launch sound and immediately know what game it is. That matters more than people admit.

reviews.title: A classic worth keeping installed
reviews.text: Not flashy anymore, but the level design still holds up and the battery drain is low.
